name: gt12_nbdel
drl:
rule "RD"
no-loop
salience 1
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    LK2(f1 == false)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "RO"
salience -5
when
    LK2($v : f0)
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
end
rule "RJ"
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, true));
    delete($p);
end
